jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services!
